name: Airtable
description: Read and write Airtable bases and records

setupSteps.title: Open the Airtable token builder
setupSteps.instructions: Personal Access Tokens (PATs) are the preferred way to authenticate AI tools.

setupSteps.title: Add scopes
setupSteps.instructions: Add at minimum: data.records:read, data.records:write, schema.bases:read. Add write/comments scopes if you want the agent to make changes.

setupSteps.title: Add base access
setupSteps.instructions: Click Add a base → choose specific bases OR All current and future bases in all workspaces for full access.
setupSteps.gotcha: A token with no bases attached can authenticate but will see zero data.

setupSteps.title: Copy the token
setupSteps.instructions: Click Create token. It starts with pat... — copy it now.

setupSteps.title: Paste below + Save
setupSteps.instructions: Paste the token below and click Save.
